category_sources: GNU gawk homepage and manual describe gawk as the GNU implementation of the AWK language and utility.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is gawk; official GNU page uses GNU Awk/gawk naming.
docs_sources: Official GNU Awk manual is the canonical documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official GNU gawk page points to Savannah development sources, and the GNU workflow manual gives the Savannah gawk git clone URL.
tags_sources: Official manual documents AWK programming and gawk command behavior.
